description_long: This is a large, modular shelving and cabinet unit, primarily composed of a series of horizontal shelves and closed compartments. The structure features a combination of open shelving on the upper section and closed storage at the bottom, with a set of three matching bench-like units positioned in front. The main body is sleek and modern, with a glossy black finish and clean, straight lines. The shelving appears deep and robust, suitable for storing or displaying a variety of items in an urban environment such as a retail store, public space, or transit station. The benches in front are supported by metallic legs, providing additional seating or display space. The overall design is utilitarian yet stylish, maximizing both storage and accessibility.
description: A large, glossy black modular shelving and cabinet unit with open shelves, closed compartments, and three matching benches in front. The design is modern and functional, suitable for urban public or commercial spaces.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the full shelving and cabinet system with open shelves, closed compartments, and three benches in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelving unit and the alignment of the benches in front.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the overall footprint and layout, with the benches clearly separated from the main shelving unit.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thickness of the main unit and the benches' placement relative to the shelving.
